sentence: 我们球队今晚要打半决赛，大家都很紧张。
pinyin: Wǒmen qiúduì jīnwǎn yào dǎ bànjuésài, dàjiā dōu hěn jǐnzhāng.
english: Our team has a semifinal match tonight and everyone is really nervous.

meaning: 1. dawn; 2. fig. the dawn of a new era
sentence: 经过几个月的努力，我们终于看到了成功的曙光。
pinyin: Jīng guò jǐ gè yuè de nǔ lì, wǒ men zhōng yú kàn dào le chéng gōng de shǔ guāng.
english: After months of hard work, we finally saw a glimmer of hope for success.

sentence: 地震导致桥梁发生断裂。
pinyin: Dìzhèn dǎozhì qiáoliáng fāshēng duànliè.
english: The earthquake caused the bridge to fracture.

sentence: 老人在去世前立好了遗嘱。
pinyin: Lǎo rén zài qù shì qián lì hǎo le yí zhǔ.
english: The elderly man drew up his will before he passed away.

sentence: 冬天容易得流感，要注意保暖。
pinyin: Dōng tiān róng yì dé liú gǎn, yào zhù yì bǎo nuǎn.
english: It's easy to catch the flu in winter, so make sure to keep warm.

sentence: 这条路正在拓宽。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo lù zhèngzài tuòkuān.
english: This road is being widened.

meaning: 1. green area (e.g. urban park or garden)
sentence: 小区里有很大一片绿地供居民休息。
pinyin: Xiǎo qū lǐ yǒu hěn dà yī piàn lǜ dì gōng jū mín xiū xi.
english: There is a large green area in the residential complex for residents to relax.

sentence: 冬天他在温室里种西红柿。
pinyin: Dōngtiān tā zài wēnshì lǐ zhòng xīhóngshì.
english: In winter he grows tomatoes in the greenhouse.

sentence: 她穿着高跟鞋走了很远的路，脚很酸。
pinyin: Tā chuānzhe gāogēnxié zǒu le hěn yuǎn de lù, jiǎo hěn suān.
english: She walked a long way in high heels and her feet were really sore.

sentence: 节目单的编排花了不少时间。
pinyin: Jié mù dān de biān pái huā le bù shǎo shí jiān.
english: Arranging the program list took quite some time.

meaning: 1. to give up one's seat for sb
sentence: 他在公交车上主动给老人让座。
pinyin: Tā zài gōngjiāo chē shàng zhǔdòng gěi lǎorén ràng zuò.
english: He proactively gave up his seat for an elderly person on the bus.

sentence: 青春期体内激素变化很大。
pinyin: Qīngchūnqī tǐ nèi jīsù biànhuà hěn dà.
english: Hormone levels change a lot in the body during puberty.

sentence: 在市场经济下，价格由供求决定。
pinyin: Zài shìchǎng jīngjì xià, jiàgé yóu gōngqiú juédìng.
english: In a market economy, prices are determined by supply and demand.

meaning: 1. serialized drama; 2. dramatic series; 3. show in parts
sentence: 妈妈最近迷上了一部古装连续剧。
pinyin: Māma zuì jìn mí shàng le yī bù gǔ zhuāng lián xù jù.
english: Mom has recently gotten hooked on a historical costume drama series.

meaning: to see (the same thing) over and over again; to see, to one's surprise
sentence: 打开门，只见他站在门口。
pinyin: Dǎ kāi mén, zhǐ jiàn tā zhàn zài mén kǒu.
english: Opening the door, I was surprised to find him standing at the entrance.

sentence: 司长亲自出席了这次会议。
pinyin: Sī zhǎng qīn zì chū xí le zhè cì huì yì.
english: The bureau chief attended this meeting in person.

sentence: 孩子们在山坡上跑来跑去。
pinyin: Háizimen zài shānpō shàng pǎolái pǎoqù.
english: The children ran back and forth on the hillside.

sentence: 检查员来工厂检查食品安全情况。
pinyin: Jiǎncháyuán lái gōngchǎng jiǎnchá shípǐn ānquán qíngkuàng.
english: The inspector came to the factory to check food safety conditions.

meaning: 1. the Four Olds (target of the Cultural Revolution)
sentence: 文化大革命期间，破除四旧成了口号。
pinyin: Wénhuà Dà Gémìng qījiān, pòchú sì jiù chéng le kǒuhào.
english: During the Cultural Revolution, eliminating the Four Olds became a slogan.

sentence: 太阳系里有八颗行星。
pinyin: Tàiyánɡxì lǐ yǒu bā kē xíngxīng.
english: There are eight planets in the solar system.

sentence: 她不幸流产了，心情很低落。
pinyin: Tā bùxìng liúchǎn le, xīnqíng hěn dīluò.
english: She unfortunately had a miscarriage and has been feeling down.

sentence: 我用微波炉热了一下饭。
pinyin: Wǒ yòng wēibōlú rè le yīxià fàn.
english: I warmed up the rice in the microwave.

sentence: 他小时候最喜欢扮成牛仔玩。
pinyin: Tā xiǎoshíhòu zuì xǐhuān bànchéng niúzǎi wán.
english: As a kid, he loved pretending to be a cowboy.

sentence: 这项科学研究花了五年时间。
pinyin: Zhè xiàng kēxué yánjiū huā le wǔ nián shíjiān.
english: This scientific research took five years to complete.

sentence: 这款手机是该品牌今年的旗舰产品。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn shǒujī shì gāi pǐnpái jīnnián de qíjiàn chǎnpǐn.
english: This phone is the brand's flagship product this year.

sentence: 酒店的装修非常奢华。
pinyin: Jiǔdiàn de zhuāngxiū fēicháng shēhuá.
english: The hotel's decor is extremely luxurious.

sentence: 他说明了来意后，我们开始谈正事。
pinyin: Tā shuōmíng le láiyì hòu, wǒmen kāishǐ tán zhèngshì.
english: After he explained his purpose in coming, we got down to business.

sentence: 每个人都有权选择自己的价值取向。
pinyin: Měi ge rén dōu yǒu quán xuǎnzé zìjǐ de jiàzhí qǔxiàng.
english: Everyone has the right to choose their own value orientation.

meaning: 1. one full year (e.g. on child's first birthday)
sentence: 宝宝明天就满一周岁了。
pinyin: Bǎobao míngtiān jiù mǎn yī zhōusuì le.
english: The baby will turn one full year old tomorrow.

sentence: 今晚有一场球赛，我们一起看吧。
pinyin: Jīn wǎn yǒu yī chǎng qiúsài, wǒmen yīqǐ kàn ba.
english: There's a game tonight — let's watch it together.

sentence: 他们订了一间海景套房度蜜月。
pinyin: Tāmen dìng le yī jiān hǎijǐng tàofáng dù mìyuè.
english: They booked an ocean-view suite for their honeymoon.

sentence: 她从小的梦想就是成为电影演员。
pinyin: Tā cóngxiǎo de mèngxiǎng jiùshì chéngwéi diànyǐng yǎnyuán.
english: Her childhood dream was to become a movie actress.

meaning: 1. it is said; 2. allegedly; 3. according to reports; 4. or so they sa
sentence: 据称这家餐厅的厨师曾在法国学艺。
pinyin: Jùchēng zhè jiā cāntīng de chúshī céng zài Fǎguó xuéyì.
english: It is said the chef at this restaurant once trained in France.

meaning: 1. to be enthralled; 2. to be entranced
sentence: 他看书看得入神，没听到我叫他。
pinyin: Tā kàn shū kàn de rùshén, méi tīngdào wǒ jiào tā.
english: He was so engrossed in his book that he didn't hear me call him.

meaning: 1. to expand one's financial resources; 2. abbr. for 開放源碼|开放源码[kā
sentence: 这个软件是开源的，任何人都可以使用。
pinyin: Zhège ruǎnjiàn shì kāiyuán de, rènhé rén dōu kěyǐ shǐyòng.
english: This software is open-source and anyone can use it.

sentence: 他的记忆有很强的选择性。
pinyin: Tā de jìyì yǒu hěn qiáng de xuǎnzéxìng.
english: His memory is highly selective.

sentence: 这个部族世代住在山里。
pinyin: Zhège bùzú shìdài zhù zài shān lǐ.
english: This tribe has lived in the mountains for generations.

sentence: 我们包车去机场，省得换来换去。
pinyin: Wǒmen bāo chē qù jīchǎng, shěngde huàn lái huàn qù.
english: We hired a car to go to the airport so we didn't have to keep transferring.

sentence: 实验室用电解水的方法制取氢气。
pinyin: Shíyànshì yòng diànjiě shuǐ de fāngfǎ zhì qǔ qīngqì.
english: The lab produces hydrogen by electrolyzing water.

meaning: an economy; a country (or region etc) viewed as an economic entity
sentence: 中国已经成为全球最大的经济体之一。
pinyin: Zhōngguó yǐjīng chéngwéi quánqiú zuì dà de jīng jì tǐ zhī yī.
english: China has become one of the world's largest economies.

sentence: 爷爷在山里耕作了一辈子。
pinyin: Yéye zài shān lǐ gēng zuò le yī bèizi.
english: Grandpa spent his whole life farming in the mountains.

sentence: 他用Excel制表，把数据整理得很清楚。
pinyin: Tā yòng Excel zhì biǎo, bǎ shùjù zhěnglǐ de hěn qīngchǔ.
english: He used Excel to make a table and organized the data very clearly.

sentence: 悠游卡没钱了，需要去便利店加值。
pinyin: Yōuyóu kǎ méi qián le, xūyào qù biànlì diàn jiā zhí.
english: My EasyCard is out of money—I need to go recharge it at a convenience store.

sentence: 这张信用卡的年费是三百元。
pinyin: Zhè zhāng xìnyòng kǎ de nián fèi shì sānbǎi yuán.
english: The annual fee for this credit card is three hundred yuan.

sentence: 中世纪的欧洲国王声称自己拥有神权。
pinyin: Zhōngshìjì de Ōuzhōu guówáng chēngchēng zìjǐ yōngyǒu shén quán.
english: Medieval European kings claimed to possess divine right.

meaning: to be trapped; to be stranded
sentence: 登山队员被困在山顶，等待救援。
pinyin: Dēngshān duìyuán bèi kùn zài shāndǐng, děngdài jiùyuán.
english: The mountaineers were trapped at the summit, waiting for rescue.

meaning: anew; from the beginning; (in poetry and song) repetition of a melody
sentence: 文件丢了，只好重头再写一遍。
pinyin: Wénjiàn diū le, zhǐhǎo chóng tóu zài xiě yī biàn.
english: The document was lost, so I had to start over and write it again from the beginning.

sentence: 远处山峰的轮廓在雾中若隐若现。
pinyin: Yuǎn chù shān fēng de lún kuò zài wù zhōng ruò yǐn ruò xiàn.
english: The outline of the distant mountain peaks appeared faintly through the fog.

meaning: 1. to seek one's livelihood; 2. to work to support oneself; 3. to
sentence: 他靠修手机谋生，养活了一家人。
pinyin: Tā kào xiū shǒujī móu shēng, yǎnghuó le yī jiārén.
english: He earns a living repairing phones and supports his whole family.

sentence: 他们制定了未来五年的蓝图。
pinyin: Tāmen zhìdìng le wèilái wǔ nián de lántú.
english: They drew up a blueprint for the next five years.
